title: NEW VOICES ON KUAC
summary: We are very excited to welcome two new voices to KUAC FM and our newsroom — Shelby Herbert and Patrick Gilchrist. title: Folic Acid (Vitamin B-9) and Pregnancy
summary: Folic Acid (Vitamin B-9) and Pregnancy Folate is a vitamin essential for pregnant mothers and women who may become pregnant as it has a critical role in fetal development. It can be found in foods rich in folate or folic acid, and as a supplement. Folate is a natural source of vitamin B-9 found in f...

summary: 2025 City of Cordova Local Hazard Mitigation Plan Update Our community is launching an effort known as the 2025 City of Cordova Local Hazard Mitigation Plan Update.
